name: ai-draw
description: Codex-integrated infinite canvas for image generation, visual annotation, and iterative editing.

scripts.dev:canvas: npx --yes pnpm@10.13.1 --filter @ai-canvas/shared build && npx --yes pnpm@10.13.1 --filter @ai-canvas/canvas-app dev:service
scripts.typecheck: npx --yes pnpm@10.13.1 --filter @ai-canvas/shared build && npx --yes pnpm@10.13.1 -r --filter @ai-canvas/canvas-app --filter @ai-canvas/mcp-server typecheck
